title: Nonatelia cataractarum
intro: I couldn't find any information on the plant "Nonatelia cataractarum."
taxonomy: Nonatelia cataractarum is classified within the family Nematelminthes, and further classified as part of the phylum Nematodea and class Nematoda. It belongs to the subkingdom Bilateria and the kingdom Animalia. More specifically, it falls under the class Nematoda, subclass Neodermata, and order Rhabditida. Further classification includes the family Nematelminthes and genus Nonatelia. This classification helps to understand its evolutionary history and its place within the larger group of nematode worms.
